sessionStart.command: repo="$(jj root 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" && bash "$repo/.agents/skills/vcs/scripts/cursor-hook.sh" sessionStart

beforeShellExecution.command: repo="$(jj root 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" && bash "$repo/.agents/skills/vcs/scripts/cursor-hook.sh" beforeShellExecution

preToolUse.command: repo="$(jj root 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" && bash "$repo/.agents/skills/vcs/scripts/cursor-hook.sh" preToolUse

afterFileEdit.command: repo="$(jj root 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" && bash "$repo/.agents/skills/vcs/scripts/cursor-hook.sh" afterFileEdit
